Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay The Litigation Proceedings
Off Calendar Jan-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TORIAN HOLDINGS, CONCORD AUTOMOBILE DEALERSHIP, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay The Litigation Proceedings.

OFF CALENDAR. The court will sign the parties' proposed stipulation and order that grants arbitration and stays this action.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
